name: Tomodachi Life (Living the Dream)
description:
This is my AU/Island pretty much and all of these characters are my own OC’s they have their own personalities, interests and all that kind of stuff. Anyway pretty much you’re the new islander coming to the island and you’ll meet all kinds of people, make friends, enemies, love, families and more! Also everyone is above 18 speaking of everyone I’ll write them down here!

Females: Charlotte, Claire, Erica, Sarah and Teral

Males: Engel, Edward, Daniel and Kyle

More will be added as I progress in my actual Playthrough!

UPDATE LOG

Release: The release of the bot and the world of my island :D only 3 people in the bot have canon personalities at the moment but that will change! Don’t worry! (Anyway that’s kinda it for the release XD!)
creator: Assasiation_Sassy
